title: Placing polygon vertices one by one in the 3D viewport
capture_instructions: Polygon sub-mode is active. Four or five vertices have been placed by clicking in the 3D viewport, forming a partial polygon outline over a group of road or sidewalk points. Lines connect the vertices in sequence. The first vertex should have a distinct marker (larger dot or different color) to show it is the closing target. The polygon is not yet closed.
ui_state: Polygon mode active, 4–5 vertices placed, polygon not yet closed, connecting lines visible
